zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffydd Ap Heilyn於大約1265年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾卡素時，他的父親Heilin ap Tudor36歲，母親Annes ferch Owain27歲。他和Jonet ferch Maredudd至少有3個女兒。他去世於大約1340年在他的家鄉享年77歲，埋葬在威爾士凱爾納方史爾卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gruffydd Ap Heilyn于大约1265年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾卡素时，他的父亲Heilin ap Tudor36岁，母亲Annes ferch Owain27岁。他和Jonet ferch Maredudd至少有3个女儿。他去世于大约1340年在他的家乡享年77岁，埋葬在威尔士凱爾納方史爾卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffydd Ap Heilyn was born about 1265, in Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Wales, his father, Heilin ap Tudor, was 36 and his mother, Annes ferch Owain, was 27. He had at least 3 daughters with Jonet ferch Maredudd. He died about 1340, in his hometown, at the age of 77, and was buried in Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Wales.

fr.Llandygai, Caernarvonshire, Wales: Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffydd Ap Heilyn est né environ 1265, à Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, Heilin ap Tudor, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Annes ferch Owain, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Jonet ferch Maredudd. Il est décédé environ 1340, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffydd Ap Heilyn um 1265 in Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heilin ap Tudor 36 und seine Mutter Annes ferch Owain 27. Er hatte mit Jonet ferch Maredudd mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1340 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Wales begraben.

ht.Llandygai, Caernarvonshire, Wales: Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd Ap Heilyn è nato il circa 1265 nel Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Galles, il suo padre, Heilin ap Tudor, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Annes ferch Owain, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Jonet ferch Maredudd. Morì circa 1340, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffydd Ap Heilynが約1265年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアペンルhイン カストルで生まれた時，父Heilin ap Tudorは36歳，母Annes ferch Owainは27歳であった。彼はJonet ferch Mareduddとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1340年に故郷で77歳で死去し，ウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアペンルhイン カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffydd Ap Heilyn(이)가 대략 1265년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 펜히 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heilin ap Tudor(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Annes ferch Owain(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Jonet ferch Maredudd(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1340년 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 펜히 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd Ap Heilyn nasceu aproximadamente 1265, em Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Gales, seu pai, Heilin ap Tudor, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Annes ferch Owain, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Jonet ferch Maredudd. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1340, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Gales.

ro.Llandygai, Caernarvonshire, Wales: Llandegai, Caernarfonshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffydd Ap Heilyn родился около 1265 г. в местности пенрин кастл, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Heilin ap Tudor было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Annes ferch Owain, 27. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Jonet ferch Maredudd. Он умер около 1340 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности пенрин кастл, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffydd Ap Heilyn nació aproximadamente 1265, en Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Gales, su papá, Heilin ap Tudor, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Annes ferch Owain, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Jonet ferch Maredudd. Murió aproximadamente 1340, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Penrhyn Castle, Caernarfonshire, Gales.
